description_long: This is a green and yellow baseball cap with a structured, six-panel design and a flat, wide brim. The crown is made of green fabric, featuring stitched ventilation eyelets and a yellow button at the top. The brim is yellow and appears to be made of a slightly stiffer material than the crown, providing structure and shade. On the front, there is a prominent white skull logo outlined in yellow, giving the hat a distinctive and bold appearance. The back of the cap shows a closed design without an adjustable strap, suggesting a fitted style. The overall finish is matte, with a soft, fabric texture typical of casual sportswear hats.
description: A green and yellow baseball cap with a flat yellow brim and a white skull logo on the front. The hat has a structured, six-panel crown and a matte, fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white skull logo on the green crown and the wide yellow brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curve of the brim and the side panels with ventilation eyelets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the six-panel construction, yellow button, and absence of an adjustable strap.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the crown and brim, with the logo partially visible.
